title: Security: [ANGLE] Heap use-after-free in ContextVk::onBeginTransformFeedback
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
There is a heap uss-after-free vulnerability that is caused by the ContextVk::onBeginTransformFeedback function.  
This vulnerability exists in the Vulkan backend.  
  
When glBeginTransformFeedback() is called, the TransformFeedbackVk::begin function calls initializeXFB
